pkgmetadata.longdescription: appnopeSimple package for disabling App Nap on macOS 10.9,which can be problematic.To disable App Nappythonimport appnopeappnope.nope()To reenable, for some reasonpythonappnope.nap()or to only disable App Nap for a particular blockwith appnope.nope_scope() do_important_stuff()It uses ctypes to wrap a [NSProcessInfo beginActivityWithOptions] call to disable App Nap.To install pip install appnope
